onBindViewHolder(CommentAdapter.CommentViewHolder, int) - Method in class com.example.myapplication.CommentAdapter
Binds a comment object to the CommentViewHolder It also sets the time that the comment was sent, whether its an organizer and calls the function to handle a long press (used for deleting)
onBindViewHolder(EventAdapter.EventViewHolder, int) - Method in class com.example.myapplication.EventAdapter
This function fills a view with the correct data to show, it also detects the click on an event and opens the event details

Binds notification data to the ViewHolder at the given position.

Called by RecyclerView to display the data at the specified position.

Binds user data to the views inside the ViewHolder and sets up the click interaction.

Organizer - Class in com.example.myapplication
Organizer user Inherits from profile, so it has the users info Role is set to Organizer

Auto assign Organizer if database says they are need for data mapping

Organizer is made Used to make the Organizer account
OrganizerDashboardActivity - Class in com.example.myapplication
Activity that displays all of the events created by the organizer From this page organizers can click to go to the event creation page Organizers can click on individual events to see more details
